title: A pilot and an air traffic controller reported a UFO near Curitiba-PR [1978]
excerpt: September 8th, 1978. Time: 23: 30Z. The pilot of the PT-JKQ aircraft flying on the Belo Horizonte-MG to Curitiba-PR route, reported to the Air Traffic Control of Brasília-DF, that he was “seeing a very intense light with color variations, in the position ’01-hour ‘, 2NM, appearing to be between 8,000 and 10,000ft with reference to […]
text_preview: September 8th, 1978. Time: 23: 30Z. The pilot of the PT-JKQ aircraft flying on the Belo Horizonte-MG to Curitiba-PR route, reported to the Air Traffic Control of Brasília-DF, that he was “seeing a very intense light with color variations, in the position ’01-hour ‘, 2NM, appearing to be between 8,000 and 10,000ft with reference to his traffic”. At 00:10Z, the air traffic monitoring of PT-JKQ was already under the jurisdiction of Curitiba Control, to carry out the descent and landing procedures. At that time, a TWR operator in Curitiba stated that he “was also seeing a luminous object in the we
summary: Pilot of PT-JKQ on the BH–Curitiba route and a Curitiba control tower operator independently reported a varying-intensity luminous UFO on Sep 8, 1978.
